🛠️ Tools for Advocacy Testing

🤖
ChatGPT
Run renewal defense queries: "Should I renew with [product]?"
 🔮
Perplexity
See what customer outcomes AI surfaces with cited sources.
 🎭
Claude
Test alternative evaluation queries from a customer perspective.
